name: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking (81.87ms/step)
blurb: Systems optimization: 3.4% faster training (81.87ms vs 84.76ms, mean of 3 seeds) via Parameter Banking and Parallel Muon (no DDP, post-backward reduce-scatter + local batched NS + async all-gather). 7,330 steps vs 7,079 in 600s. Mean int6 sliding window val_bpb 1.1247 (std 0.0006). All artifacts under 16MB.
author: abaybektursun
